title: limnia viridis
intro: Limnia viridis, also known as the Green Limnia or Sea Squill, is a perennial bulbous plant native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include its ability to be used as a cardiac stimulant and to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and whooping cough. The health benefits of Limnia viridis include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and improving cardiovascular function. Herbal preparations of Limnia viridis include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
